unnecessary_service_request_created: Agent created a ServiceRequest order when only a value answer was required.
missing_fhir_query_before_answer: Provided reasoning or answer without performing required FHIR query actions.
patient_not_found_incorrect: Incorrectly reported patient not found despite patient existing.
answer_format_wrong_type_string: Returned a narrative string when a structured list or specific format was expected.
answer_format_includes_text: Returned combined value and date in a single string instead of separate elements.
answer_format_wrong_type_number: Returned numeric answer as a string instead of the expected numeric type (or wrong format).
quantity_unit_mismatch_missing: Returned numeric value without required unit of measurement.
placeholder_minus_one_returned: Returned sentinel '-1' placeholder instead of actual observation value/date.
